message:
Refactor batch sending to incremental push-based StreamingBatchSender

Replace the iterator-based send_conversation_batches with a new
StreamingBatchSender struct that accumulates conversations one at a time
and auto-flushes when batch limits are exceeded. This enables the
connector producer to use scan_with_callback instead of scan, streaming
conversations through the indexing pipeline incrementally rather than
collecting all results into a Vec first — reducing peak memory usage for
large connector scans.

Also switch franken-agent-detection dependency to local path for
development iteration (v0.1.2 -> v0.1.3).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
